gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/372)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/372)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا تَقْتُلُوا الْقُنْبُرَةَ وَ لَا تَأْكُلُوا لَحْمَهَا فَإِنَّهَا كَثِيرَةُ التَّسْبِيحِ تَقُولُ فِي آخِرِ تَسْبِيحِهَا لَعَنَ اللَّهُ مُبْغِضِي آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليهم السلام ) .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Abu Abdullah Al Jamourany, from Suleyman Al Ja’fary who said,

‘I heard Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> saying:’ Do not kill the grouse, and do not eat its flesh, for it is frequent in the Glorification. She is saying at the end of its Glorification. ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Curse those who hate the Progeny<sup>asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from abu ‘Abd Allah, al-Jamuraniy from Sulayman al-Ja‘fariy who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ’Do not kill the lark and do not use its flesh for food, because it says a great deal of Tasbih (Allah is free of all defects) and at the end it says, ‘May Allah condemn those who hate the family of Muhammad, ‘Alayhim al-Salam.’”
